title: Trace 1: Friends and university
task: Write an informal email about a new friend you met at university. Describe the person and ask a question. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 2: Photo competition
task: Write an informal email about a photo competition. Say what happened and how you felt. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 3: Restaurant
task: Write an informal email about a new restaurant. Describe the food, service and price. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 4: Car accident
task: Write an informal email about a small accident. Explain what happened and how you felt. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 5: Travel
task: Write an informal email about a trip. Mention transport, hotel and places you visited. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 6: Technology
task: Write an informal email about a new phone or app. Say why it is useful. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 7: Health
task: Write an informal email giving advice to a friend who wants to be healthier. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.

title: Trace 8: Sport
task: Write an informal email about a match or a sporting event. Write 120-150 words. Use an informal style and include a final question.
